principles: Installer nutzt nur Dateien aus diesem Paket als JARVIS Basis.
Keine alten Projektordner werden gelesen oder referenziert.
Externe Downloads erfolgen nur für Laufzeitabhängigkeiten über winget und Python/npm Paketmanager.
Bestehende Installationen werden vor Clean Install in ein Backupverzeichnis verschoben.

productization.update_system: GitHub Release ZIP staging with optional token and product installer apply

github_updates.token_rule: Token is optional for public repositories and required only for private repositories or higher API limits. It is read from the local environment and must never be committed into this package.

installer_hotfix.fix: Invoke-Capture guards null Arguments before ProcessStartInfo.ArgumentList.Add

installer_hotfix_2.fix: ProcessStartInfo.ArgumentList removed for Windows PowerShell compatibility; uses ProcessStartInfo.Arguments with explicit quoting

installer_hotfix_3.fix: Get-PythonLauncher assignment is array-wrapped; venv creation uses pyCmd variable instead of pyLauncher[0]

installer_hotfix_4.fix: Invoke-Checked now runs native commands via ProcessStartInfo and treats stderr as log output; only ExitCode fails.
installer_hotfix_4.reason: npm notice on stderr caused PowerShell NativeCommandError although npm install succeeded.

installer_hotfix_5.fix: All PowerShell files now use ProcessStartInfo-based Invoke-Checked. Old 2>&1 Tee-Object native command pipeline removed from setup/repair/start common function.
installer_hotfix_5.reason: npm notice on stderr must not stop setup after successful npm install.

installer_hotfix_6.fix: INSTALL_JARVIS.ps1 winget install now uses ProcessStartInfo-based Invoke-NativeLogged instead of 2>&1 | Tee-Object.
installer_hotfix_6.reason: winget can emit non-fatal stderr/progress output; installer should fail only on native ExitCode.

installer_hotfix_7.fix: Added CHECK_GITHUB_UPDATE.ps1/.bat for GitHub Release download, staging and optional PRODUCT_INSTALLER update apply.
installer_hotfix_7.reason: Installed systems need a stable local bootstrapper that can fetch the latest release without storing tokens in the package.

installer_hotfix_8.fix: GitHub release updates now support public repositories without JARVIS_GITHUB_TOKEN. Token remains optional for private repositories and higher API limits.
installer_hotfix_8.reason: The public xpozer/jarvis-windows-standalone release flow should not require every user to create a GitHub token.
